title: Huawei S620-16X8YZ, 10G optical smart switch, 8x SFP28
description: The Huawei S620-16X8YZ is a highly equipped Layer 3 switch with stacking capabilities , offering a combination of 16Ã 1/2.5/10 G optical SFP+ ports and 8Ã 1/2.5/10/25 G optical SFP28 ports . Additionally, it features a console port for management, an Ethernet management port, and a USB port for firmware upgrades or configuration backup transfers On the rear side, the switch includes a slot for an expansion module that can add either 8Ã SFP+ or 4Ã SFP28 ports (software configurable). Heat dissipation is handled by a pair of hot-swappable fans . The device also supports redundant power supplies with hot-swap capability, offering four types of power modules with different input voltages and power ratings, with or without fans. When using two power supplies, it is not possible to combine models with and without a fan. However, it is… The switch comes with 1 PAC600S12-PB AC power supply unit included Device 230V AC Power Cable Ground Cable Rack mounts (14) Screws (4) Self-Adhesive Rubber Pads 600W power supply PAC600S12-PB
